caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair styled in a high ponytail wears black headphones and a black t-shirt with a white logo on the chest. She is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of her. Behind her is a light-colored wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black door marked "Employee Only". A screen in the background displays the word "Johnson" in red text above a graphic. On the lower portion of the screen, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" alongside a circular "PODCAST" emblem and the text "By 11 logo Studio". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, shifting her facial expressions slightly as she speaks and looks toward someone off-screen, while the background elements and equipment remain static.
